title: The Yakuza's Guide to Babysitting
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode TV anime (Feel/Gaina, 2022). Manga ongoing (16 tankobon volumes, current ch. ~64 as of 2026; AniList lists no fixed chapter count for the ongoing series). Fan continue-reading guides point viewers to resume the manga at chapter 37 after the anime, putting the season's coverage at chapters 1-36. No distinct named story arcs are used by the source material, so broad season-based entries are used instead.
